audit_logs_tenant_isolation.name: audit_logs_tenant_isolation
audit_logs_tenant_isolation.using:
"audit"."logs"."organization_id" = (
            SELECT id FROM tenancy.organizations
            WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true)
          )
          OR current_setting('app.global_retention_cleanup', true) = 'true'

sessions_user_access.name: sessions_user_access
sessions_user_access.using:
(
          "auth"."sessions"."user_id" = (
            SELECT id FROM auth.users
            WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
          )
          OR "auth"."sessions"."public_id" = current_setting('app.current_session_public_id', true)
          OR "auth"."sessions"."token_hash" = current_setting('app.current_session_token_hash', true)
          OR current_setting('app.session_retention_cleanup', true) = 'true'
        )
sessions_user_access.withCheck:
(
          "auth"."sessions"."user_id" = (
            SELECT id FROM auth.users
            WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
          )
          OR "auth"."sessions"."public_id" = current_setting('app.current_session_public_id', true)
          OR "auth"."sessions"."token_hash" = current_setting('app.current_session_token_hash', true)
          OR current_setting('app.session_retention_cleanup', true) = 'true'
        )

notifications_tenant_isolation.name: notifications_tenant_isolation
notifications_tenant_isolation.using:
(
            "notify"."notifications"."organization_id" IS NOT NULL
            AND "notify"."notifications"."organization_id" = (
              SELECT id FROM tenancy.organizations
              WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true)
            )
          )
          OR current_setting('app.global_retention_cleanup', true) = 'true'

webhook_delivery_attempts_tenant_isolati.name: webhook_delivery_attempts_tenant_isolation
webhook_delivery_attempts_tenant_isolati.using:
"notify"."webhook_delivery_attempts"."webhook_id" IN (
            SELECT id FROM notify.webhooks
            WHERE organization_id = (
              SELECT id FROM tenancy.organizations
              WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true)
            )
          )
          OR current_setting('app.global_retention_cleanup', true) = 'true'

user_notification_preferences_user_org_a.name: user_notification_preferences_user_org_access
user_notification_preferences_user_org_a.using:
"auth"."user_notification_preferences"."user_id" = (
            SELECT id FROM auth.users
            WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
          )
          AND (
            "auth"."user_notification_preferences"."organization_id" IS NULL
            OR "auth"."user_notification_preferences"."organization_id" = (
              SELECT id FROM tenancy.organizations
              WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true)
            )
          )
user_notification_preferences_user_org_a.withCheck:
"auth"."user_notification_preferences"."user_id" = (
            SELECT id FROM auth.users
            WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
          )
          AND (
            "auth"."user_notification_preferences"."organization_id" IS NULL
            OR "auth"."user_notification_preferences"."organization_id" = (
              SELECT id FROM tenancy.organizations
              WHERE public_id = current_setting('app.current_organization_id', true)
            )
          )
